title: High-energy kitten
summary: A short hunting game for a young cat.
steps: Move it low on the floor.
warnings: Do not use hands as toys.

title: Plan for a very active kitten
summary: Hunt, catch, calm down and reward.
steps: Let the kitten catch the toy.
dontDo: do not use hands as toys

title: Calm play for a senior cat
steps: Keep the toy on the floor.
Stop when the cat gets tired.
warnings: Pain or limping needs veterinary advice.

title: Senior cat — gentle daily plan
steps: Evening: repeat a short no-jump game.

title: Hunt game for an active cat
steps: Choose a wand toy or ball.

title: Active cat — full hunting session
summary: Stalk, chase, catch and calm down.

summary: A home toy for hiding and hunting.
steps: Add a ball and soft cloth.
Move a toy near the holes.

summary: A scent game for an indoor cat.

title: Home scent puzzle for cats
summary: Calm food search to reduce boredom.
steps: Make one hiding place harder next time.

title: 5-minute play
summary: A short activity for little time.
warnings: Short sessions beat overly long play.

title: Micro-session: 5 minutes a day

title: Quiet play for a calm cat

steps: Let the cat set the pace.

title: Universal indoor play
summary: A safe start for most cats.

title: Indoor cat play plan
